name: ODK Solutions Company, Ltd.
summary: ODK Solutions Company, Ltd. provides business process outsourcing services. The company also offers trust calculation services, software development services, network associated systems, and open systems, as well as sells computer packages and OA machines. Its services for educational facilities include business process outsourcing services; Web application services; Web A&A systems; public relations support for entrance examination; cooperation with intramural systems; and services for score conversion and verification of National Center Test for university admissions. The company's services for securities companies comprise back office systems, and system for prevention of unfair transactions, as well as outsourcing services related to connection between securities company and Japan Securities Depository Center, Inc.; and services for general companies consist of data management, batch processing, and report creation, as well as data aggregation and analysis, and housing services. In addition, it develops and sells applications for smart phones and tablet-type devices based on iOS and Android; and offers services for securities finance and clearing service companies. The company was founded in 1963 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
